85.reason: [Accessing p->data when p may be NULL; also skips the first real node due to dummy head and prints nothing if list has only dummy node]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->data when p may be NULL; also skips the first real node due to dummy head and prints nothing if list has only dummy node]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->data when p may be NULL; also skips the first real node due to dummy head design]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [When list is the dummy head node and list->link is NULL (i.e., empty polynomial), p becomes NULL, leading to dereferencing NULL pointer. Also, it skips the first real node by starting with p = list->link and printing p immediately.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->data when p may be NULL; also skips the first node and prints from second node onward due to initial dummy node]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->data when p may be NULL; also skips the first actual term because list is a dummy head]
